title: Image Segmentation, Pixel by Pixel
tagline: From classification to per-pixel labels — masks, IoU, and region growing
summary: Paint a mask on a real image and watch a live mask-IoU score against ground truth. Step through region-growing from any seed pixel. Compare semantic, instance, and panoptic segmentation across five scenes — with every per-pixel number computed in the browser.
highlights: Paint your own segmentation mask and watch mask-IoU + pixel accuracy update every brushstroke.
Run flood-fill region growing live: click any seed pixel and step through the algorithm.
Compare semantic, instance, and panoptic targets on the same scene to see how the problem changes.
Adjust a color-similarity threshold and watch the segmentation tighten or spill into the background.
